title: local AI v8: Stateless Generation + NOcron Deterministic Loop

steps.name: Context + Tool Readiness
steps.detail: ingest intent, tool cache readiness, preflight context

steps.name: File Scaffold + Tests
steps.detail: create task list and one validation test per task

steps.name: Write
steps.detail: generate runnable unit code for scheduled task

steps.name: Export
steps.detail: zip/export to user-selected path; optional git push

nocron_loop.trigger: initial cron triggers first runnable task
nocron_loop.self_schedule: python loop schedules exactly one next cron job after each completion
nocron_loop.stop: exit when no pending runnable tasks remain
